title: Opening for Production Engineer at Amara Raja Batteries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Amara Raja Batteries
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
